summary: Comprehensive testing of Tradium Signal Monitor completed. All 42 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with 4 tabs, modal interactions, and chart display working correctly. Background workers (signal_monitor, entry_monitor, telegram_bot) all running.
test_credentials: No auth required for this app
seed_data_creation: Test signal ETHUSDT SHORT already exists in DB from previous setup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend APIs return data without _id field. Chart endpoint serves images correctly. 4 tabs (Tradium, DCA#4, Вход + Разворот, Результаты) switch content properly. Modal opens on row click, closes with X button or overlay click. Stats pills show correct values including DCA#4 pill. Candle pattern detection tested with synthetic data - all bullish/bearish patterns detected correctly. DCA#4 trigger logic verified for both LONG and SHORT directions. Background workers running: signal_monitor, entry_monitor, telegram_bot.

backend_api.GET /api/entries/stats: PASS - returns all required fields (total_signals, watching, dca4_reached, entered, open, tp_hit, sl_hit, win_rate)

candle_patterns.bullish_patterns: PASS - hammer, engulfing, morning star, pin bar, doji detected
candle_patterns.bearish_patterns: PASS - shooting star, engulfing, evening star, pin bar, doji detected
candle_patterns.direction_filtering: PASS - LONG gets bullish only, SHORT gets bearish only

entry_monitor_logic.format_functions: PASS - work for both LONG and SHORT

frontend_ui.4_tabs: PASS - Tradium, DCA#4, Вход + Разворот, Результаты
frontend_ui.chart_display: PASS - chart image loads in modal
